targets.expr: (sum(veto_overview_device_first_seen_count and on(day) (veto_overview_device_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})) - sum(veto_overview_device_last_seen_count and on(day) (veto_overview_device_day_start_timestamp_seconds < ${range_from}))) or vector(0)
sum(veto_overview_day_sessions and on(day) (veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})) or vector(0)

(sum(veto_overview_day_distinct_ips and on(day) (veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})) / clamp_min(count(veto_overview_day_distinct_ips and on(day) (veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})), 1)) or vector(0)

panels.title: Average Daily Users (Based on Unique IP)

targets.expr: sum(veto_overview_device_first_seen_count and on(day) (veto_overview_device_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_overview_device_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})) or vector(0)

panels.title: Total New Users (Based on Device ID)

targets.expr: ((sum(veto_overview_device_first_seen_count and on(day) (veto_overview_device_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})) - sum(veto_overview_device_last_seen_count and on(day) (veto_overview_device_day_start_timestamp_seconds < ${range_from}))) - sum(veto_overview_device_first_seen_count and on(day) (veto_overview_device_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_overview_device_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to}))) or vector(0)

panels.title: Total Returning Users (Based on Device ID)

targets.expr: sum(veto_overview_day_rows and on(day) (veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})) or vector(0)
sum(veto_watch_day_raw_watch_hours and on(day) (veto_watch_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_watch_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})) or vector(0)

panels.description: Watch minutes divided by the sum of daily distinct-IP counts in the selected range.

targets.expr: ((60 * sum(veto_watch_day_raw_watch_hours and on(day) (veto_watch_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_watch_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})) / clamp_min(sum(veto_overview_day_distinct_ips and on(day) (veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})), 1)) or vector(0)) <= 999

(((60 * sum(veto_watch_day_raw_watch_hours and on(day) (veto_watch_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_watch_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})) / clamp_min(sum(veto_overview_day_distinct_ips and on(day) (veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})), 1)) or vector(0)) > 999) / 60

panels.title: Avg Watch Time per Daily Viewer

targets.expr: sum(veto_overview_day_bytes_gib and on(day) (veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})) or vector(0)
sum(rate(cdn_requests_total[5m]))
cdn_distinct_ip_recent
cdn_consumer_latest_event_unixtime * 1000
cdn_consumer_event_lag_seconds
sum(rate(cdn_requests_total[1m])) * 60
sum(increase(cdn_requests_total[5m]))

((60 * sum(veto_watch_day_raw_watch_hours and on(day) (veto_watch_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_watch_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})) / clamp_min(sum(veto_overview_day_distinct_ips and on(day) (veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})), 1)) or vector(0)) <= 999

(((60 * sum(veto_watch_day_raw_watch_hours and on(day) (veto_watch_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_watch_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})) / clamp_min(sum(veto_overview_day_distinct_ips and on(day) (veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds >= ${range_from} and veto_overview_day_start_timestamp_seconds <= ${range_to})), 1)) or vector(0)) > 999) / 60
